response.justification: While the candidate accumulates roughly 15–17 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, the role requires a director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and cloud platform strategy experience. The candidate is operating at Senior/Staff engineer level, with AI exposure limited to one recent role involving MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — there is no demonstrated history of shipping AI-powered products at scale, advising strategic customers, shaping cloud/AI product direction, or the kind of industry-recognized thought leadership this position demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput infrastructure
Entrepreneurial experience founding and sustaining an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective)
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP tooling and agentic workflows at re:cinq
concerns: Current and historical titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer) are well below the director-level IC seniority the role requires
AI expertise is shallow and very recent — no demonstrated AI products at scale, no publications, no recognized thought leadership in the domain
No evidence of cloud platform strategy ownership, customer advisory work, or cross-organizational technical influence at the required scope

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering breadth and founder experience
